About

What is this?

#PROJECT82 is a free, independent travel diary for exploring the Philippines. Tap any of the country's 82 provinces on the interactive map to mark it as visited or a place you'd like to go, jot down memories from your trip, and watch your progress fill in.

What's inside

  • An interactive map of all 82 Philippine provinces
  • A province-by-province list view with notes and status tracking
  • A mountains-climbed tracker for hikers
  • Quick quizzes about Philippine geography, culture, and history
  • Shareable progress cards for social media

Independence

Project82ph.com is an independently produced hobby project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or produced by any Philippine government agency or tourism board.

Contact

Get in Touch

Found a bug, have feedback, or want to suggest a feature? We'd love to hear from you.

Email: brendevera.p82@gmail.com

We read every message, though as a small independent project we may not be able to reply to all of them individually.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 7, 2026

Overview

Project82ph.com ("the site") is a free travel-tracking tool for exploring the Philippines. This policy explains what information is collected when you use the site and how it's used.

Information We Collect

The site does not require an account and does not collect names, emails, or other personal details from you directly. Your province progress, notes, mountain log, and settings are stored locally in your browser using localStorage, and never leave your device unless you use the built-in export or share features yourself.

Advertising & Cookies

This site may display ads served by Google AdSense. Google and its partners may use cookies or similar technologies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites.

  • Google may use cookies to serve ads based on a user's prior visits.
  • You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings, or generally opt out of third-party vendors' use of cookies at www.aboutads.info/choices.
  • Third-party vendors may also use cookies to serve ads on this site. See how Google uses information from sites that use its services for more detail.

Analytics

We may use basic, aggregated analytics to understand overall traffic and usage patterns. This data does not identify you personally.

Children's Privacy

This site is intended for general audiences and is not directed at children under 13.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

Terms of Use

Last updated: July 7, 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By using Project82ph.com, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site.

Use of the Site

The site is provided for personal, non-commercial use. You may not copy, redistribute, or resell the site's content without permission.

No Guarantee

This site is a personal travel-tracking tool. Map boundaries, quiz content, and other information are provided for general reference and enjoyment only, and may contain errors or omissions.

Local Data

Your progress is stored in your browser's local storage. Clearing your browser data, switching browsers, or switching devices may result in loss of saved progress unless you use the export feature.

Limitation of Liability

The site is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages or losses arising from use of the site.

Changes

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

Disclaimer

Not an Official Source

Project82ph.com is an independent, unofficial hobby project. It is not created, reviewed, endorsed, or affiliated with any Philippine government agency, tourism board, or mapping authority.

Accuracy

Province boundaries, quiz questions, and other content are provided as a general travel-tracking and trivia aid. While care is taken to keep content accurate and up to date, the site may contain errors or omissions and should not be relied on as an authoritative source.

For Fun, Not for Navigation

Always refer to official maps and government sources for travel planning, boundaries, or geographic accuracy. This site is best used to track and share your own travel journey, not as a primary reference.
